lessons: Lancer (spear) killed us in 3 of last 4 rounds — retreat or flank immediately on sight; spear outreaches staff and dominates mid-range engagements.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in rounds 208 and 212 — staff cannot outrange bow; always use cover, corners, or elevated terrain when bow users are detected.
Grapple users (Hook, Deadeye) caused 2 deaths in last 3 rounds — their mobility negates staff range; prioritize eliminating or avoiding them in tight spaces or open areas.
Sword users caused 8 of last 10 deaths — even when we kill them, staff’s slow recovery leaves us vulnerable; disengage after hits and avoid prolonged fights.
Staff wins only occur when we kill 4+ sword users without dying — this requires perfect positioning; avoid engaging unless outnumbering or flanking.
Reaper (staff) killed us in round 214 — we are vulnerable to same-weapon duels; avoid 1v1s with staff users unless we have health or terrain advantage.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple has the highest win rate (18/133) in history_summary and excels against dominant sword and staff users by closing distance quickly and bypassing range disadvantages.
